Documentation audit of one module in the Pixir repository (you are in the repo root, read-only).
Target file: lib/mix/tasks/pixir.bench.real_subagents.ex
Read the ENTIRE file (in sections if large). Audit: (1) moduledoc present and truthful vs what the module actually does; (2) public functions (def, not defp) lacking @doc; (3) any claim in docs/comments that drifted from the code, cited with line RANGES.
